invariants.name: NO_COGNITION_WITHOUT_STG
invariants.description: No cognitive cycle may run without runtime STG authorization.

invariants.name: MIND_CANNOT_EXECUTE
invariants.description: alive-mind produces descriptive decisions only. It may not execute actions.

invariants.name: BODY_CANNOT_DECIDE
invariants.description: alive-body senses and acts but may not determine intent or meaning.

invariants.name: EXPERIENCE_STREAM_IS_IMMUTABLE
invariants.description: The experience stream is append-only. No entry may be modified or deleted.

invariants.name: ENFORCEMENT_INTEGRITY_REQUIRED
invariants.description: Every decision must carry a valid integrity hash before body execution.

invariants.name: FIREWALL_MUST_CLEAR
invariants.description: Signals must carry firewall_status='cleared' before reaching the STG.
